title: Ad Extendra
description: Ad Extendra is an add-on mod, that adds more content to Ad Astra like it didn't already have enough content.
body:
# This project has been discontinued.
If you want to continue this project, you have full rights to do so by creating a fork of the GitHub repository for this mod.

# Ad Extendra

Ad Extendra is an add-on mod, that adds more content to [Ad Astra](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra) like it didn't already have enough content. It is in beta right now and there isn't much content but I'm constantly trying to improve it and add new things.

## (Planned) Features
### 4 new planets
-   Jupiter
-   Saturn
-   Uranus
-   Neptune

### 9 new dwarf planets
-   Ceres
-   Eris
-   Gonggong
-   Haumea
-   Makemake
-   Orcus
-   Pluto
-   Quaoar
-   Sedna

### 1 new exoplanet
**Proxima Centauri**
-   b

### Mod Support

The mod currently only supports [Forge 1.20.1](https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/index_1.20.1.html) and depends on [Ad Astra v1.15.5](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra/version/1.15.5) exactly (any older or newer version of Ad Astra ****will not work!****). It also depends on all the mods that Ad Astra depends on, which are: [Resourceful Lib](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/resourceful-lib), [Resourceful Config](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/resourceful-config), and [Botarium](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/botarium)
